headlines.summary: The price of physical crude has collapsed in recent weeks from premiums of over $30 per barrel above the Brent benchmark in early April, to near-parity or even at small discounts in the May buying cycle window. headlines.title: US Crude Inventories Fall But Gasoline Stocks See Surprise Build
